title: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva reads halting, Sara turns to camera
prompt: Mid-close-up on @beach-shore — wet sand at the gentle calm tide line. @sara-beach already kneeling on the RIGHT on the wet sand with both knees softly on the sand, both hands gently holding the unrolled @rescue-note open in front of her chest. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — BOTH holding the unrolled note open in front of her chest. @eva-beach already kneeling on the LEFT pressed in close to Sara, both knees softly on the wet sand, her right index finger gently pointing at the words on the paper, sounding them out slowly with cute concentration on her face. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — right index finger softly tracing words on the note, left hand resting softly in her lap. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva (slow halting cute reading, finger softly tracing the words): "I... am... STUCK... on... a... fa-RA-way... ISLAND... please come find me!" Eva's eyes go huge with wonder at her own reading. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara (eyes huge, then turning her head DIRECTLY to camera with friend-to-friend conspiratorial sparkle): "WHO do YOU think wrote this?!" Sara holds her warm look at the camera waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to call out a guess. Both girls stay kneeling close together on the wet sand. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the note. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout — no shouting, no scary intensity, no environmental shake. The wet sand stays plain wet sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
